scripts.cap:build: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:ios: npm run cap:build && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:android: npm run cap:build && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:serve: npm run cap:build && npx cap run ios --livereload --external
scripts.cap:serve:android: npm run cap:build && npx cap run android --livereload --external
scripts.deploy:static: npm run build && echo 'Static build ready for deployment in ./build directory'
scripts.serve:local: npm run build && npx serve build
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy build
scripts.deploy:pages:preview: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy build --compatibility-date=2024-01-01
